log: === ROUND 1 ===

Ogre can't reach Bugbear — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).

=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Bugbear — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 10 vs DC 14]

→ Bugbear — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Bugbear — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Bugbear — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
